paper_title: VaxxStance@IberLEF 2021: Going Beyond Text in Cross-lingual Stance Detection
evaluation_method: Stance detection on tweets around the anti-vaccine movement in Basque and Spanish. Given a tweet, determine whether it expresses AGAINST, FAVOR, or NEUTRAL (NONE) stance towards the anti-vaccine topic. Evaluation uses the metric from SemEval 2016 Task on Stance Detection: macro-average F1-score of two classes (FAVOR and AGAINST), although the NONE class is also present in the test data. Part of the BasqueGLUE benchmark.
metric: macro-average F1 of FAVOR and AGAINST classes
